item.title: [Infraestrutura] CVE-2026-42869 - Docker
item.description:
🚨 CVE-2026-42869 - Docker
 
Criticidade: Crítica
Ferramenta: Docker
Fonte: NVD
CVSS: 10.0
Resumo:
SOCFortress CoPilot focuses on providing a single pane of glass for all your security operations needs. Prior to 0.1.57, SOCFortress CoPilot ships a hardcoded JWT signing secret as a fallback value in backend/app/auth/utils.py:28 and ships it verbatim in .env.example. Any deployment where JWT_SECRET is not explicitly set — including the default Docker Compose setup — signs all authentication tokens with this publicly...
Link: https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-42869

item.title: [Segurança] CVE-2026-7819 - Check Point
item.description:
🚨 CVE-2026-7819 - Check Point
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: Check Point
Fonte: NVD
CVSS: 8.1
Resumo:
Symbolic-link path traversal (CWE-61, CWE-22) in pgAdmin 4 File Manager. check_access_permission used os.path.abspath, which resolves '..' but does not resolve symbolic links, while the subsequent kernel write follows symlinks. An authenticated user could plant a symbolic link inside their own storage directory pointing outside it and induce pgAdmin to write to any path reachable by the pgAdmin process. Fix switches...
Link: https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-7819

item.title: [Sistemas / Cloud] CVE-2026-6433 - WordPress
item.description:
🚨 CVE-2026-6433 - WordPress
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: WordPress
Fonte: NVD
CVSS: 7.3
Resumo:
The Custom css-js-php WordPress plugin through 2.0.7 does not properly sanitize user input before using it in a SQL query, and the result is passed to eval(), allowing unauthenticated users to execute arbitrary PHP code on the server.
Link: https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-6433

item.title: [Segurança] cPanel CVE-2026-41940 Under Active Exploitation to Deploy Filemanager Backdoor
item.description:
🚨 cPanel CVE-2026-41940 Under Active Exploitation to Deploy Filemanager Backdoor
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: Qualys
Fonte: The Hacker News
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
A publicação relata a vulnerabilidade CVE-2026-41940 associada a Qualys. Vale consultar o link para verificar impacto, versões afetadas e orientações de correção.
Link: https://thehackernews.com/2026/05/cpanel-cve-2026-41940-under-active.html

item.title: [Sistemas / Cloud] USN-8263-1: ImageMagick vulnerabilities
item.description:
🚨 USN-8263-1: ImageMagick vulnerabilities
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: Ubuntu
Fonte: https://ubuntu.com/security/notices/rss.xml
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
It was discovered that ImageMagick incorrectly handled certain malformed image files in certain instances. If a user or automated system using ImageMagick were tricked into opening a specially crafted image, an attacker could possibly use these issues to cause a denial of service or possibly execute code. (CVE-2018-15607, CVE-2018-18544, CVE-2019-13137, CVE-2019-13391, CVE-2019-13391) It was discovered that ImageMagi...
Link: https://ubuntu.com/security/notices/USN-8263-1

item.title: [Sistemas / Cloud] USN-8267-1: Linux kernel vulnerabilities
item.description:
🚨 USN-8267-1: Linux kernel vulnerabilities
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: Ubuntu
Fonte: https://ubuntu.com/security/notices/rss.xml
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
Qualys discovered that several vulnerabilities existed in the AppArmor Linux kernel Security Module (LSM). An unprivileged local attacker could use these issues to load, replace, and remove arbitrary AppArmor profiles causing denial of service, exposure of sensitive information (kernel memory), local privilege escalation, or possibly escape a container. (LP: #2143853, CVE-2026-23268, CVE-2026-23269, CVE-2026-23403, C...
Link: https://ubuntu.com/security/notices/USN-8267-1

item.title: [Sistemas / Cloud] CVE-2026-42316 - Azure
item.description:
🚨 CVE-2026-42316 - Azure
 
Criticidade: Média
Ferramenta: Azure
Fonte: NVD
CVSS: 6.5
Resumo:
kafka-sink-azure-kusto Kafka Connect plugin is the official Microsoft sink for Azure Data Explorer (Kusto). Prior to 5.2.3, kafka-sink-azure-kusto did not sanitize user-controlled values inside the kusto.tables.topics.mapping configuration. The db, table, mapping, and format fields of each mapping entry were interpolated directly into KQL management/query commands via String.formatted(...) (e.g., FETCH_TABLE_COMMAND....
Link: https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-42316

item.title: [Segurança] Hackers Used AI to Develop First Known Zero-Day 2FA Bypass for Mass Exploitation
item.description:
💣 Hackers Used AI to Develop First Known Zero-Day 2FA Bypass for Mass Exploitation
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: Qualys
Fonte: The Hacker News
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
Google on Monday disclosed that it identified an unknown threat actor using a zero-day exploit that it said was likely developed with an artificial intelligence (AI) system, marking the first time the technology has been put to use in the wild in a malicious context for vulnerability discovery and exploit generation. The activity is said to be the work of cybercrime threat actors who appear to
Link: https://thehackernews.com/2026/05/hackers-used-ai-to-develop-first-known.html

item.title: [Infraestrutura] Non-Disruptive VMware vCenter Patching in VMware Cloud Foundation 9.1
item.description:
📰 Non-Disruptive VMware vCenter Patching in VMware Cloud Foundation 9.1
 
Criticidade: Crítica
Ferramenta: VMware
Fonte: https://blogs.vmware.com/feed
CVSS: 9.1
Resumo:
VMware vCenter is a critical component of the VMware Cloud Foundation (VCF) stack, helping administrators juggle service uptime with important maintenance and patching cycles. Traditional in-place vCenter patches can result in downtime of up to an hour or more. VMware Cloud Foundation 9.1 introduces vCenter quick patch, taking vCenter patching to the next level.
Link: https://blogs.vmware.com/cloud-foundation/2026/05/12/vcenter-quick-patch/

item.title: [Infraestrutura] What’s New with vSphere in VMware Cloud Foundation 9.1?
item.description:
📰 What’s New with vSphere in VMware Cloud Foundation 9.1?
 
Criticidade: Crítica
Ferramenta: ESX
Fonte: https://blogs.vmware.com/feed
CVSS: 9.1
Resumo:
A notícia está relacionada a ESX no contexto de segurança da informação, com potencial relevância para monitoramento, prevenção ou resposta.
Link: https://blogs.vmware.com/cloud-foundation/2026/05/12/whats-new-with-vsphere-9-1/

item.title: [Infraestrutura] VMware vCenter Virtual Hardware Gets an Upgrade in vSphere with VCF 9.1
item.description:
📰 VMware vCenter Virtual Hardware Gets an Upgrade in vSphere with VCF 9.1
 
Criticidade: Crítica
Ferramenta: ESX
Fonte: https://blogs.vmware.com/feed
CVSS: 9.1
Resumo:
vCenter VM hardware has remained at version 10 (compatible with ESX 5.5 and later) since VMware vSphere 5.5. With the release of vSphere with VMware Cloud Foundation 9.1, it is now upgraded to version 17. Note: Depending on the UI, KB, or TechDoc page, you may see the terms “virtual machine compatibility,” “compatible with ESX …
Link: https://blogs.vmware.com/cloud-foundation/2026/05/12/vcenter-virtual-hardware-upgrade/

item.title: [Segurança] OpenAI Launches Daybreak for AI-Powered Vulnerability Detection and Patch Validation
item.description:
📰 OpenAI Launches Daybreak for AI-Powered Vulnerability Detection and Patch Validation
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: Qualys
Fonte: The Hacker News
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
OpenAI has launched Daybreak, a new cybersecurity initiative that brings together frontier artificial intelligence (AI) model capabilities and Codex Security to help organizations identify and patch vulnerabilities before attackers find a way in using the same issues. "Daybreak combines the intelligence of OpenAI models, the extensibility of Codex as an agentic harness, and our partners across
Link: https://thehackernews.com/2026/05/openai-launches-daybreak-for-ai-powered.html
